addition.item: Added Joomla update server metadata for the public update stream.
Added a changelog URL for Joomla administrator update visibility.

fix.item: Corrected Joomla media asset URIs so CSS and JavaScript load from their installed paths.
Synchronized package metadata, manifest version, asset version, and installer messages to 3.1.7.

language.item: Updated English and Turkish installer strings for the 3.1.7 release.
